definition: An Inverse Fair Value Gap (IFVG) forms when price violates (trades completely through) an existing FVG, converting it from a continuation zone into a reversal zone with flipped polarity. A bullish FVG that gets broken to the downside becomes a bearish IFVG — the gap that was supposed to provide support now acts as resistance.
depends_on: market_structure (CHoCH or BOS through the FVG triggers the inversion)
displacement (strong displacement through the FVG confirms the inversion)
feeds_into: entry_models (IFVG is a reversal entry zone — trade FROM the flipped zone)
breaker_blocks (IFVG often co-locates with breaker blocks — same reversal logic)
related_to: balanced_price_range (when opposing FVGs overlap, creating equilibrium)
consequent_encroachment (CE of IFVG = precision reversal entry)

bullish_fvg_to_bearish_ifvg.step_1: Bullish FVG forms (gap between candle 1 high and candle 3 low in an up-move)
bullish_fvg_to_bearish_ifvg.step_2: Price later trades COMPLETELY through the bullish FVG to the downside
bullish_fvg_to_bearish_ifvg.step_3: The bullish FVG is now INVERTED — it becomes a BEARISH IFVG
bullish_fvg_to_bearish_ifvg.step_4: When price retraces back up to this zone, it acts as RESISTANCE
bullish_fvg_to_bearish_ifvg.entry: Sell at IFVG zone (preferably at CE), SL above IFVG high

bearish_fvg_to_bullish_ifvg.step_1: Bearish FVG forms (gap between candle 1 low and candle 3 high in a down-move)
bearish_fvg_to_bullish_ifvg.step_2: Price later trades COMPLETELY through the bearish FVG to the upside
bearish_fvg_to_bullish_ifvg.step_3: The bearish FVG is now INVERTED — it becomes a BULLISH IFVG
bearish_fvg_to_bullish_ifvg.step_4: When price retraces back down to this zone, it acts as SUPPORT
bearish_fvg_to_bullish_ifvg.entry: Buy at IFVG zone (preferably at CE), SL below IFVG low

vs_regular_fvg.regular_fvg: Holds — price fills into it and reverses. Continuation of the existing trend.
vs_regular_fvg.inverse_fvg: Violated — price broke through it. Now acts from the OPPOSITE direction. Reversal signal.
vs_regular_fvg.detection_rule: If price CLOSES beyond the far boundary of an FVG, mark it as inverted and flip the direction

strong_ifvg: Displacement candle broke through the original FVG (3+ ATR move)
First retest of the IFVG after inversion (virgin IFVG)
IFVG aligns with HTF bias direction
weak_ifvg: Slow grind through the FVG (no displacement)
Very small FVG to begin with (<0.1% of price)

scoring.ifvg_stacked_with_breaker: +8 to ICT score (double confirmation of reversal)

bridge_integration.detection: When an active FVG is fully violated (price closes beyond far boundary), convert to IFVG with flipped direction
bridge_integration.entry_zone: Use IFVG CE as limit entry for reversal trades
bridge_integration.score_impact: Active IFVG at entry = +3 to +6 based on quality
bridge_integration.cleanup: Remove the original FVG from active zones when it becomes an IFVG
